step2.title: Launch a Smart Campaign

pricing.title: Flexible Plans for Everyone

items.question: Is Wassel free to try?
items.answer: Yes. You can sign up for free and get starter tokens to analyze your LinkedIn profile and tailor a CV before upgrading

items.question: Is my data private and secure?
items.answer: Absolutely. Your data is stored on Supabase with row-level security and fully complies with Saudi PDPL

items.question: Do I need a LinkedIn Premium account?
items.answer: No. Wassel works with any free LinkedIn account — no premium subscription required

items.question: How does AI write the emails?
items.answer: Wassel uses Claude AI to craft personalized, professional B2B emails in Arabic or English, tailored to each decision-maker

items.question: Do you support Arabic and English?
items.answer: Yes. Wassel is Arabic-first with full RTL support and Cairo font, plus complete English localization

items.question: Can I cancel anytime?
items.answer: Yes. All subscriptions are month-to-month and you can cancel from the dashboard at any time with no hidden fees

footer.description: Wassel - Your Smart Platform for Saudi Job Search
footer.copyright: All rights reserved 2026 Wassel. Made in Saudi Arabia
footer.madeIn: Made in Saudi Arabia with love

footer.copyright: © 2026 Wassel. All rights reserved. · Made with care in Al-Ahsa, Saudi Arabia

about.title: About Wassel
about.subtitle: An Arabic-first platform built with craft — from the heart of Al-Ahsa
about.story_para1: Wassel is an Arabic AI-powered platform that helps professionals grow their LinkedIn presence — from profile analysis and CV creation to content generation and outreach campaigns
about.story_para2: We believe every professional deserves intelligent tools that understand their language and their goals

team.title: Built by two
team.subtitle: We share your market, your language, and your ambition

hassan.name: Hassan Al-Mudhi
hassan.bio:
Co-founder of Wassel, leading our business side and customer relationships.

The Saudi market taught me one thing: professionals here need tools that understand their context — not imported solutions. That's what Ali and I set out to build — a platform that bridges the gap between ambition and opportunity.

My vision: to bring intelligent tools to every Saudi professional that respect their time, their language, and their aspirations.

ali.name: Ali Alhashim
ali.bio:
Co-founder of Wassel, leading product and engineering.

I started this project in Al-Ahsa with one question: why don't our professional tools truly understand us? Since that day, I've been working to answer it — one line, one feature at a time.

I believe the best products are built when the engineer understands who they're building for, before understanding the technology itself.

how_used.title: How we use your data
how_used.body_1: We use your professional information to run Radar analysis, build your ATS resume, and generate career content.
how_used.body_2: Your data is never shared with other users, never sold. Analyses are private to you.
how_used.body_3: You own your data. You can download a full copy or delete it entirely at any time.
